APPLICATION FOR WAIVER OF JURY FEES AND EXPENSES PURSUANT TO G.C. 68633, CRC 3.51, 8.26, AND 8.818 (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY DEFENDANT MELO, NADINE ORDER FOR WAIVER OF JURY FEES AND EXPENSES GRANTED PURSUANT TO G.C. 68634 (E), CRC 3.52
ORDER SUSTAINING DEFENDANT'S DEMURRER
MINI-MINUTES FOR SEP-25-2009 9:30 AM FOR DEPT 301

LAW AND MOTION 301, PLAINTIFF WELLS FARGO BANK, N.A'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT IS CONTINUED TO OCTOBER 6, 2009 PER REQUEST OF MS. MACDONALD. PLAINTIFF WANTS TO BE GIVEN AN OPPORTUNITY TO RESPOND TO THE OPPOSITION THAT WAS FILED ON SEPTEMBER 23 IN WHICH PLAINTIFF WAS NOT SERVED A COPY. THE COURT INDICATED THAT PROOF WAS SERVED BY MAIL ON SEPTEMBER 23, 2009. JUDGE: PAUL H. ALVARADO, REPORTER: CAROL KAREN, CSR# 8189

LAW AND MOTION 301, RULING - LATE NOTICE WAS GIVEN TO THE OTHER SIDE TO CONTEST THE TENTATIVE RULING. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS: PLAINTIFF WELLS FARGO BANK, N.A., AS TRUSTEE, ON BEHALF OF THE CERTIFICATEHOLDERS, MASTER ASSET BACKED SECURITIES 2007-NCW MORTGAGE PASS-THROUGH CERTIFICATES SERIES 2007-NCW, MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT IS GRANTED. PLAINTIFF HAS ESTABLISHED THAT THE RENT ORDINANCE DOES NOT APPLY. MOVING PARTY IS TO SUBMIT A PROPOSED FORM OF ORDER PURSUANT TO CCP 437 C(G). JUDGE: PETER J. BUSCH, REPORTER: CAROL KAREN, CSR # 8189 301/PJB
